__fixture__.name: canonical_layer_catalog
__fixture__.scenario: The editor stack publishes one canonical layer catalog before implementation so every launch-bearing accessory has exactly one owner and one role class.

layer_definitions.owns_summary: Tab-facing document identity, dirty state, pin state, compare role, restored or recovered state, and top-level constrained-editing badges.
layer_definitions.must_never_own: Source bytes, save authority, policy truth, or the only visible explanation for conflict or read-only state.

layer_definitions.owns_summary: Breadcrumbs, root identity, symbol ancestry, source-of-truth relation, and immediate constrained-state reasons.
layer_definitions.must_never_own: The sole document identity or hidden state that changes write safety.

layer_definitions.owns_summary: Line numbers, breakpoint and debug markers, fold controls, diagnostic and change lanes, current-line cues, and optional overview marker projections.
layer_definitions.must_never_own: Dense toolbars, per-line text-column shifts, or hover-only routes to core workflows.

layer_definitions.owns_summary: Rendered source text, selections, carets, multi-cursor state, column-selection state, and inline composition.
layer_definitions.must_never_own: Horizontal movement caused by diagnostics, badges, hints, overlays, or status items.

layer_definitions.owns_summary: Code lenses, inlay hints, inline quick actions, ghost text, and related inline metadata.
layer_definitions.must_never_own: Committed source content, obscured selections, typing-budget stalls, or broad hidden mutations.

layer_definitions.owns_summary: Hover cards, peek, docs, signature help, parameter help, and short-lived source-anchored knowledge surfaces.
layer_definitions.must_never_own: Focus traps, the only route to critical instructions, or durable editor identity.

layer_definitions.owns_summary: Encoding, line endings, language mode, selection and cursor stats, semantic or execution mode, degraded capability, and compact ambient status.
layer_definitions.must_never_own: High-urgency blockers requiring stronger treatment or the only visible constrained-state disclosure.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Visible tab label for the active document route.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Canonical buffer identity or source bytes.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Dirty, conflict, blocked-save, or recovered-draft marker projected from buffer authority.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Private per-window dirty truth.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Pinned or unpinned working-set state.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Close behavior or dirty confirmation by itself.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Source, target, base, result, or unified compare role.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Diff truth or comparison basis.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Exact, compatible, layout-only, evidence-only, or recovered-draft restore posture.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Live readiness after restore.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Close, unpin, or dirty-confirm entry point for the tab route.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Buffer deletion or silent dirty discard.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: File and symbol breadcrumb continuity.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: The sole full title or canonical source identity.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Root, host, or workspace identity cue.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Trust, policy, or write authority.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Current symbol ancestry when semantic or structural data is available.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Semantic freshness claims without provider refs.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Generated, derived, or projection relation to canonical source or generator.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Editable source truth by implication.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Reason writes or semantics are read-only, degraded, narrowed, stale, or blocked.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Generic service health that hides the affected capability.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Line position and orientation.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Per-line text start or semantic truth.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Current-line orientation cue.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Selection or diagnostic severity.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Breakpoint toggle and current debug stop cue.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Diagnostic severity or execution authority.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Fold or unfold structured regions.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Hidden risk suppression for diagnostics, conflicts, trust, or search hits.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Diagnostic lane marker with source and severity.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: The only details route or a line-local width change.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Git, diff, review, or change-state lane marker.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Diff authority or review mutation.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Blame, coverage, test, or collaboration cue.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Space ahead of diagnostics, breakpoints, or text-column stability.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Optional overview or minimap projection of gutter and decoration meaning.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: The sole carrier of critical diagnostics, conflict, trust, or write-safety state.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Rendered source or admitted buffer representation.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Provider-generated assistance or annotation state.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Selected source range and range-selection semantics.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Action execution without command routing.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Insertion point and focus location.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Transient overlay focus or provider state.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Multiple insertion points or column-selection mode.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Separate undo authority outside grouped editor commands.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Preedit or marked text anchored to source.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Committed bytes before the platform commits composition.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Inline command entry such as references, tests, or run actions.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Source text or hidden multi-file mutation.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Advisory type, parameter, or structural metadata.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Committed content or exact semantic truth when provider state is stale.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Inline action entry point for quick fixes or bounded editor commands.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Implicit apply without preview or consequence disclosure.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Advisory completion or generation proposal with accept and reject routes elsewhere.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Committed source or silent AI acceptance.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Short-lived hover knowledge anchored to source.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: The only route to critical state or a focus trap.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Keyboard-navigable peek surface preserving source anchor and focus return.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Durable editor identity or source mutation.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Source-anchored docs or help detail with provenance and freshness.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: The only instruction for a blocking workflow.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Active signature or parameter help.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Current exact provider truth when stale or cached.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Displayed encoding state.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Source rewrite or save conversion.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Displayed line-ending state.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Silent line-ending rewrite.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Language mode and grammar or semantic posture.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Provider capability claims not backed by language records.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Selection, cursor, and multi-cursor counts.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Selection authority or focus movement.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Semantic, execution, or debug mode state.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: Runtime authority or hidden downgraded provider state.

accessory_assignments.owns_summary: Compact degraded or large-file capability state with details route.
accessory_assignments.must_never_own: The only constrained-editing disclosure.

state_placement_rules.minimum_disclosure: Header and context name source, target, base, result, or unified role plus compare basis.
Header and context name restore posture and safe actions.
Header and context name generated posture, lineage, and canonical source relation.
Header and context name write limit reason and nearest safe next action.
Header and context name live, reconnecting, stale snapshot, blocked runtime, or manual rebind state.
Context and status name the affected capability, what still works, and details route.
Header, context, and status name large-file trigger, constrained features, and safe escalation path.

stable_text_column_rules: Transient diagnostics, hints, overlays, badges, status changes, typing, cursoring, and selection changes must not move the source text column.
Gutter lanes reserve width at viewport level; a marker appearing on one line may not change that line's text start independently.
Line-number width may change only when a configured digit reserve threshold changes or an explicit renderer policy recomputes it.
Inline assistance that cannot fit without moving source text suppresses, wraps into a non-source lane, or moves to transient detail.
Any permitted text-column recompute emits the reason class for renderer tests, accessibility review, and support export.
